prompt: Create a cinematic anime-style wide shot of a teenage boy riding a bicycle straight toward the viewer on a sunny riverside road in a modern Japanese city. The camera is positioned low and centered in front of the bike, close enough to show the handlebars, brake cables, gloved hands, front wheel top, and the rider’s upper body in a dynamic symmetrical composition. The rider has deep red tousled hair, sharp anime eyes, a focused confident expression with a slight open-mouth smile, and wears a glossy red vented cycling helmet, black fingerless gloves, a black zip-up hoodie over dark clothing, navy knee-length shorts, and a black backpack with visible shoulder straps. The bicycle is a dark mountain bike or hybrid bike with flat handlebars and a blue-black frame. The setting is a bright river embankment road with a metal guardrail on the left, calm blue water beside it, a long steel truss bridge in the background to the left, apartment towers and city buildings to the right, green grass along the roadside, and a vivid blue sky with large fluffy white clouds. Use clean high-quality anime character rendering blended with a realistic detailed background, strong midday sunlight, crisp shadows cast onto the asphalt, vibrant colors, depth perspective, and a sense of forward motion. No text, no logos, no extra people, no vehicles, no watermark.
promptEn: Create a cinematic anime-style wide shot of a teenage boy riding a bicycle straight toward the viewer on a sunny riverside road in a modern Japanese city. The camera is positioned low and centered in front of the bike, close enough to show the handlebars, brake cables, gloved hands, front wheel top, and the rider’s upper body in a dynamic symmetrical composition. The rider has deep red tousled hair, sharp anime eyes, a focused confident expression with a slight open-mouth smile, and wears a glossy red vented cycling helmet, black fingerless gloves, a black zip-up hoodie over dark clothing, navy knee-length shorts, and a black backpack with visible shoulder straps. The bicycle is a dark mountain bike or hybrid bike with flat handlebars and a blue-black frame. The setting is a bright river embankment road with a metal guardrail on the left, calm blue water beside it, a long steel truss bridge in the background to the left, apartment towers and city buildings to the right, green grass along the roadside, and a vivid blue sky with large fluffy white clouds. Use clean high-quality anime character rendering blended with a realistic detailed background, strong midday sunlight, crisp shadows cast onto the asphalt, vibrant colors, depth perspective, and a sense of forward motion. No text, no logos, no extra people, no vehicles, no watermark.
promptZh: 创作一张电影级动漫风格的广角镜头，画面中 一位少年 正在现代日本城市的阳光河畔公路上骑着自行车径直向镜头驶来。摄像机位处于自行车前方低处，居中对准，距离足够近，可以展示车把、刹车线、戴手套的双手、前轮顶部以及骑行者上半身的动态对称构图。骑行者留着 深红色 的凌乱头发，有着锐利的动漫眼睛，表情专注而自信，嘴角带着一丝微张的微笑；佩戴着亮面 红色 的通风骑行头盔，戴着黑色露指手套，身穿黑色拉链连帽衫搭配深色衣物，穿着海军蓝及膝短裤，背着带有明显肩带的黑色背包。自行车为深色山地车或混合动力车，配有平把和蓝黑色车架。背景是明亮的河堤公路，左侧有金属护栏，旁边是平静的蓝色水面，左后方有一座长长的钢桁架桥，右侧是公寓楼和城市建筑，路边有绿草，天空湛蓝，漂浮着大朵蓬松的白云。采用干净的高质量动漫角色渲染，并融合写实且细节丰富的背景，呈现强烈的正午阳光、投射在柏油路上的清晰阴影、鲜艳的色彩、深度透视感以及向前的动感。画面中无文字、无标志、无额外行人、无车辆、无水印。
